# swapapi.xyz — Free Token Swap API

> Token swap calldata as a single GET request. No auth, no SDK. 46 chains.

## Full LLM Reference

The complete and up-to-date reference — all chain IDs, token addresses, response format, error codes, and execution walkthrough — is at:

https://swapapi.xyz/llms.txt

Fetch that URL for the authoritative content. The version in this repo is intentionally minimal to avoid going stale.

## Quick Links

- API: https://api.swapapi.xyz (fallback: https://api-production-b91c.up.railway.app)
- OpenAPI spec: https://api.swapapi.xyz/openapi.json
- Docs (Swagger UI): https://api.swapapi.xyz/docs
- Site: https://swapapi.xyz

## Files in this repo

- [CLAUDE.md](CLAUDE.md): Agent quick-start — endpoint, approval flow, simulation, tests
- [openapi.json](openapi.json): OpenAPI 3.1.0 machine-readable schema
- [README.md](README.md): Human-readable usage guide
